data.content:
Implemented repo-switch loading behavior in worktree branch `foolery-f3eb-loading-feedback`.

Changes:
- Removed `keepPreviousData` from repo-scoped beats, final-cut, and retakes queries so repo changes clear stale data instead of holding prior repo results.
- Added shared `RepoSwitchLoadingState` with spinner/skeleton and wired it into beats, final-cut, and retakes views.
- Closed an open beat detail lightbox when `activeRepo` changes to avoid stale beat detail content during transitions.
- Added `src/lib/__tests__/repo-switch-loading-contract.test.ts` to lock the loading contract.

Validation:
- `bun run lint` (passes; one existing warning remains in `src/components/beat-form.tsx` about `react-hooks/incompatible-library`)
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run test`
- `bun run build`

Browser verification on `http://localhost:3001/beats`:
- Switched from repo `foolery` to `knots`.
- Observed the URL change immediately to `?repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Fknots`.
- During the fetch delay, page body showed `Loading beats...` and no stale text from the previous repo row (`Wire lease agent metadata into knot step records`).
- After completion, loading state disappeared and the new repo view rendered without flashing the old repo content.

Commit:
- `c001f5b3003f` Show loading feedback on repo switch
